candidates.name: Abhinand S

candidates.driverRatingDesc: Candidate shows high vehicle control stability and defensive driving habits.
strengths: Maintains accurate centering inside test lane grid
Smooth steering wheel movement during the curve
Correct indicator engagement prior to turning
weaknesses: Slight delay in restoring steering output after parking merge
